name: screening_agent
description: Runs a specialist screening agent on one specific angle of candidate fit. Call once per screening dimension with a focused question. Each call receives the full job posting and resume scoped to the partition.

partition_agent.description: The partition agent name this question belongs to (from the partitions JSON)

question.description: The specific screening question to evaluate

name: evaluate_coverage
description: Evaluate whether the screening findings so far are sufficient to make a confident recommendation. Call this after all partition agents have reported. Returns a coverage score, list of gaps, and whether the coverage is sufficient.

findings_summary.description: A brief summary of all screening findings collected so far

coverage_score.description: Coverage score 1-10 (10 = fully covered, no gaps)

gaps.description: List of screening dimensions that still have unresolved uncertainty

sufficient.description: True if coverage is sufficient to make a confident recommendation

name: submit_final
description: Submit the final hiring recommendation. Call this ONLY after evaluate_coverage returns sufficient=true (or after gap-filling follow-ups). This is the only valid way to conclude the screening.

rationale.description: 2-4 sentence rationale integrating all screening findings

key_concerns.description: Top concerns or risks (empty list if none)
